title: Dirt Wake Word — my clones + RIRs + negatives
description: ElevenLabs-cloned 'hey claudia' positives, captured room impulse responses, curated negative clips harvested from live deployment. Versioned often — re-push via `kaggle datasets version`. Staged locally under voice_samples/, rirs/, negatives/ trees that mirror /kaggle/input/dirt-wakeword-mine/ at training time.
